completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation requirements for 12 project types
Classified as monolith with 1 part. Type: web (React 19 + Vite 6 + TypeScript)
Tech stack: React 19 + TypeScript 5.8 + Vite 6 + Tailwind v4 + Zustand 5 + Konva + Gemini API
Exhaustive scan: 40+ files read. 22 components, 8 services, 3 hooks, 1 store, catalog with 10 garments
Source tree documented with all directories annotated. Written to source-tree-analysis.md
Dev setup: npm install + GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local + npm run dev. Written to development-guide.md
Architecture document written. Monolith SPA, layered services pattern
Generated: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md, data-models.md, api-contracts.md
Master index.md generated with navigation to all docs
